title: Claire's Cozy Cobblemon
body:
My personal ideal modpack for living out Pokemon in Minecraft

# WIP cobblemon modpack
if you have any questions/feedback DM me on twitter @clairee_8304

 ## Features:
- Only Pokemon spawn (some exceptions, does not affect spawners)
- New world generation
- New structures
- Ridable Pokemon

 more to come eventually

planned features:
- better recipes
- optional questline for catching every pokemon
- more farming/food stuff

### external content sources:
- https://vanillatweaks.net/ (resourcepacks + datapacks)
- Panorama and Logo resourcepacks made by me
